hero.title: BiblioFuse
hero.subtitle: The Ultimate E-Book Ecosystem. Tools for managing, Reader for enjoying.

warning.title: Download from Official Sources Only
warning.message: BiblioFuse apps are exclusively distributed through Apple App Store, Google Play Store, and Microsoft Store. Never download from unofficial websites to protect your device from malware and security threats.

reader.title: Next-Gen Reading Experience
reader.subtitle: Built for speed, comfort, and flexibility. The BiblioFuse Reader app adapts to how you want to read.

immersive.title: Immersive Reading
immersive.desc: Distraction-free UI with customizable themes and reading modes.

webtoon.title: Continuous Webtoon Mode
webtoon.desc: Experience comics and manga in a seamless vertical scroll, optimized for mobile screens. Use auto-scroll for hands-free reading.

peek.title: Peek Zoom
peek.desc: Double-tap to instantly zoom into details without losing your place. Perfect for reading small text in dense panels.

smart.title: Smart Tagging & Ratings
smart.desc: Organize your library with custom tags and star ratings. Keep track of what you've read and what you love.

compress.title: Compression Tools
compress.desc: Merge series or reduce file size of CBZ/EPUB up to 50%.

cloud.title: Cloud Sync
cloud.desc: Seamlessly sync your reading progress and library across devices using iCloud (iOS) or Google Drive (Android).

lang.title: 12 Languages Support
lang.desc: Fully localized interface available in 12 major languages, making reading accessible worldwide.

about.title: About BiblioFuse
about.intro_1: BiblioFuse is a suite of tools and readers designed to give e-book lovers complete control over their library. Unlike walled gardens that lock you into a specific ecosystem, BiblioFuse empowers you to manage, convert, and read your books on any device.
about.intro_2: Our web tool uses cutting-edge WebAssembly (WASM) technology to process files entirely on your device. This means private, fast, and secure file management without ever uploading your personal library to a server.
about.work_text: We are a small, passionate team dedicated to building software that respects user privacy and ownership. We are currently open to freelance opportunities and collaborations.
about.connect_text: Interested in contributing or hiring? Reach out to us.

home.title: Manage & Read E-Books Anywhere
home.desc: BiblioFuse: Offline ebook reader & library manager. Tag, rate, track reading progress. Private personal library with iCloud sync. No ads, no tracking. CBZ, EPUB, ZIP. iOS, Android, Windows.

reader.title: Next-Gen E-Book Reader
reader.desc: A fast, distraction-free e-book reader for iOS and Android. Features continuous webtoon mode, smart tagging, and Peek Zoom for comics.

about.title: About Us
about.desc: Learn about the team behind BiblioFuse. We are dedicated to building private, user-first software for e-book lovers.

noAds.title: No Ads
noAds.desc: Enjoy uninterrupted reading without annoying advertisements

noTracking.title: No Tracking
noTracking.desc: Your privacy is protected. We don't collect or sell your data

cloudSync.title: Cloud Sync
cloudSync.desc: Seamlessly sync your library across devices with iCloud

compression.title: Smart Compression
compression.desc: Reduce file size and save storage space without quality loss

aboutPage.lead: Tools for people who want their reading library and document workflows to stay private, local, and under their control.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.desc: BiblioFuse is built around local processing, no ads, and no tracking. This policy explains what stays on your device and what limited data may be involved when you use platform services.
privacyPage.error: Error loading privacy policy. Please try again later.

webapp.seoDesc: Manage and convert your digital library. Manage EPUB, PDF, CBZ and ZIP files, save storage with smart series merging, and keep everything private in a browser WASM tool.
webapp.title: BiblioFuse Web App
webapp.subtitle: Your universal e-book toolkit in the browser

features.title: 100% Private
features.body: All processing happens locally in your browser

features.title: No Installation
features.body: Works instantly on any platform or device

features.title: Merge & Convert
features.body: EPUB, PDF, CBZ and ZIP are supported

webapp.info: Opens in a new tab · No signup required · Powered by WebAssembly
webapp.platforms: Works on Windows, macOS, Linux, Android, iOS and ChromeOS

footer.desc: A small suite of tools and readers for people who want their library on their own devices, not behind someone else's login.
footer.stores: Apple App Store · Google Play · Microsoft Store

home.seoTitle: BiblioFuse - E-book Reader, Library Manager & Compression Tools
home.seoDesc: BiblioFuse is a private e-book ecosystem for reading, organizing, streaming, compressing and merging your personal library on iPhone, iPad, Mac, Android and the web.

hero.version: Version 2.0.1 - native on iPhone, iPad & Mac
hero.desc: BiblioFuse is a native reader and library manager for personal ebook, comic, and document collections across iPhone, iPad, and Mac.
hero.warningBody: BiblioFuse is exclusively distributed via Apple App Store, Google Play Store and Microsoft Store. Never download from unofficial websites.

table.title: Pick the edition for how you work.
table.desc: All editions share the same on-device, no-tracking philosophy. Differences are about platform and workflow.
